title: Create Mob Egg
description:
Do you want to get a mob egg in survival?
With this data pack, you can do anything!
body:
--- **Have you ever wanted to hold a mob egg in survival? This time you can!** ---
Crafting books of knowledge by version
1.16 - 1.19.4 ![f](https://i.postimg.cc/k5rmsJQT/20250622-0831-32-5823815.gif)
1.20 - 1.21.6 ![f](https://i.postimg.cc/nLHn5Vyh/20250622-0856-33-2978491.gif)
**To get mob eggs, put the book of knowledge in the stone cutter.** ### ![egg](https://i.postimg.cc/L4NJpbNw/20250614-1302-53-2720985.gif) **Crafting a spawner/Crafting a trial spawner** ![spawner](https://i.postimg.cc/4N1kMDPH/20250614-1309-43-3698765.gif) ![spawner](https://i.postimg.cc/gjJ8pFRc/20250614-1315-37-2290604.gif) --- - 1.20+ - soon! - 1.21 - 1.21.1 - soon!
